name: QIANSAI_G474_STDRIVE101_FOC_P2_KIT
longDescription: No-power Workbench aggregation candidate for Packet A capture. It links NUCLEO-G474RE, the QS_TIM1_OPAMP_PWR STDRIVE101 no-power adapter candidate, and the temporary R57BLB50L2 motor placeholder. It is not current PCB2 as-built proof and does not authorize Generate, build, flash, 24V, motor connection, or Gate PWM output.
shortDescription: Qiansai G474 STDRIVE101 no-power FOC P2 kit
